report.summary: Cycle 2 design audit: created 5 layout.tsx metadata files for client-component pages (bitgo-ipo, congressional-tokenization, katana-perps, layer-3-chains, tokenized-funds), added ARIA accessibility to layer-3-chains FAQ accordion, fixed focus-visible styles and semantic nav on leveraged-tokens ToC, removed redundant back-to-top link. All 10 new pages confirmed to have OG images.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: CRITICAL FIX: Created layout.tsx with full Metadata export for 5 client-component pages that were silently dropping OG/Twitter/canonical metadata (bitgo-ipo-crypto-infrastructure-guide, congressional-tokenization-hearing-guide-2026, katana-perps-idex-acquisition-guide, layer-3-chains-guide-2026, tokenized-funds-institutional-defi-guide)
layer-3-chains FAQ accordion: Added aria-expanded, aria-controls, id, and role='region' attributes for screen reader support
layer-3-chains FAQ buttons: Added focus-visible box-shadow (2px #6366f1) via onFocus/onBlur handlers
leveraged-tokens ToC: Wrapped in semantic <nav aria-label='Table of Contents'> element
leveraged-tokens: Added focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-[#6366f1] to all 9 anchor links
leveraged-tokens: Removed redundant 'Back to top' <a href='#'> link (was duplicate of BackToTop component, caused page-jump UX issue)

sections.title: Visuals & OG Status
items: All 10 new pages confirmed to have matching OG SVGs in /public/ — no new images needed
5 layout.tsx files now properly reference OG images via metadata.openGraph.images with correct 1200x630 dimensions
Twitter cards now properly configured with summary_large_image for all 5 previously-broken pages
